creator: emaste@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Ben Woods from comment #3)
> FAT doesn’t have inodes, so what behaviour should df(1) exhibit when reporting
> the amount of free inodes?

That's a fair point and there are of course multiple interpretations, but I'd argue the pre-c33db74b5323 behaviour is not a sensible one. If we don't feel that change is appropriate in stable/13 I'd suggest we just report 0/0.
